communityResult.scope: Place reviews and discussions, report dialog, feed, forum categories and threads, moderator queue, and moderator case.

exceptions.reason: EasyAdmin 5 uses a specific dark-themed background/sidebar layout that fails the WCAG AAA or AA color contrast ratio (minimum 4.5:1) for some navigation elements.
exceptions.mitigation: Accepted residual vendor risk. Users can customize their browser or use system-level high contrast modes. Main application themes for public users fully satisfy the contrast requirements.

exceptions.reason: EasyAdmin 5 navigation links and user profile buttons are pre-rendered with internal templates that lack screen-reader accessible names (e.g. aria-label or sr-only text) for certain icon-only elements.
exceptions.mitigation: Accepted residual vendor risk. public-facing community routes (/spolecznosc, /forum) are built with fully accessible names and labels. Screen reader users can rely on landmark navigation.

exceptions.reason: Vendor filters and action toggles in the EasyAdmin interface contain icon-only actions that do not provide an explicit aria-label or descriptive text.
exceptions.mitigation: Accepted residual vendor risk. Public forms and dialogs in our community module are fully labeled.

exceptions.reason: EasyAdmin dashboard wrapper templates sometimes lack HTML5 landmark regions or have multiple nested banner/content regions without unique titles.
exceptions.mitigation: Accepted residual vendor risk. The public site has a strictly checked landmark and ARIA region hierarchy.
